programme.title: E1 - First Steps
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: E2 - Back to the Wild
programme.desc: Balance the pain of goodbyes with hope for the future as a generation of rescued elephants are finally released. Welcome new additions to the Reteti family, including a baby elephant rescued from a watering hole and a traumatized zebra named Kisima.

programme.title: E4 - Chimpanzee
programme.desc: Track chimpanzees through the Rwandan forest with Max, who tries to convince these powerful monkeys that he’s a friend, not a foe. Pick up some key tips on jungle dining and witness complex family dynamics, including grooming and socializing.

programme.title: E3 - Clash of the Alphas
programme.desc: Stand back when a brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf. Assess Matnoor’s poor parenting skills, see alpha wannabe Ajit make his move, then cool off as a heat wave pushes everyone to share the wealth in the forest.

programme.title: E1 - Seasonal Shores
programme.desc: Strap in for a thrilling ride as Lizzie travels by air, land, and sea to meet Alaskan wildlife and visit the world’s remotest corners. Eavesdrop on underwater Arctic residents with scientists, dine with polar bears, and scavenge with bald eagles.

programme.title: E2 - Back to the Wild

programme.title: E4 - Flight Path
programme.desc: Plot a course for adventure as animals go on remarkable journeys through the skies. Navigate a wooden labyrinth with a speedy goshawk, join a sandgrouse’s trek to a distant watering hole, and see a murmuration of starlings mesmerize their nemesis.

programme.title: E2 - Islands
programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.

programme.title: E3 - Heat
programme.desc: Go to extremes, from the Sahara to the outback, where animals are teaching us how to survive in our heating world. Shelter in caves with chimps, see camels sip salt water, and listen as zebra finches sing to their eggs to make their chicks smaller.

programme.title: E5 - Sloth Bear
programme.desc: Peek inside the secret world of the fearless, often misunderstood sloth bear. Travel to Sri Lanka with Max and discover how this fierce, shaggy animal fights off leopards and other deadly rivals, all while trying to secure enough protein to survive.

programme.title: E33 - Football
programme.desc: Stanley is called to help setup a football pitch so the children can play, although he must think on his feet when the weather turns, and the players start getting wet.

programme.title: E43 - Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: E44 - Wild Girls
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E10 - Tulip Fields, Netherlands
programme.desc: Is Glitch stealing tulips from the Netherlands? That's what the Go Jetters think!

programme.title: E3 - Scooter
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'scooter' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different scooters - a purple scooter, a blue scooter and a bopping scooter.

programme.title: E3 - Got Your Goat
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: E47 - Cricket
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: E13 - The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E25 - Holi Festival Of Colour, India
programme.desc: Glitch takes all of the colourful powder from the Festival of Colour in Dwarka, India. Can the Go Jetters get it back?

programme.title: E12 - Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: E19 - The River Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E64
programme.desc: 此劇敘述年幼便出道養家的一線女演員與PD的愛情故事。女演員因母親賭博的債務及醜聞一夜之間跌落谷底。PD嘗試鼓勵她重新振作，女演員卻消失了……

programme.title: E5 - A Krazy Killing
programme.desc: August 29, 2006, Riverside County, CA. Deputies from the Riverside County Sheriff's Department respond to the scene of an abandoned vehicle in a remote area of the Gavilan Hills.

programme.title: Invasive Fungal Infections - The New Threat
programme.desc: Invasive fungal infections are increasingly leading to life-threatening diseases worldwide. And in agriculture, fungi pose a massive threat to harvests. And the available antidotes for humans and plants are increasingly losing their effectiveness.

programme.title: What The Indigo Crisis Reveals About India's Aviation Industry
programme.desc: Low-cost carrier IndiGo dominates Indian skies. But when revised pilot rest rules took effect in late 2025, planning failures left nearly a million passengers stranded, exposing risks in a near-monopoly aviation market.

Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

Find out what is like to live in France, get to know its regions, and feel the true taste of France.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Down To Earth[Live]
programme.desc: Down To Earth presents people behind fascinating environmental, health and technological innovations in a bid for sustainable solutions to our changing world. programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. programme.title: The Day Henry Met....an Elephant
programme.desc: Today Henry meets an old Elephant at a safari park. Elephant teaches Henry about his family tree.

programme.title: Engaging Engineering
programme.desc: How do simple building elements create architecture? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of construction. Have hands-on fun by building your own tower, and get to know Fazlur Rahman Khan, who came up with the ‘tube' structure in skyscraper design.

programme.title: New Names
programme.desc: Can the Junior Vets determine the sex of a very special penguin? Six cute kittens need checkups and new names - meet X-ray, Smudge, and, of course, baby Johnny! And Paul, the rat, has trouble breathing.

programme.title: You've Got a Friend In Me
programme.desc: Best friends Talia and Theo are getting prepared for the British Trampoline Championships. Talia takes Theo to the funfair to help take his mind off his worries before the big event.

programme.title: Matching Socks
programme.desc: In this episode we explain the concept of 'probability'. How can we weigh all our possibilities to eventually pick the most likely outcome? In order to illustrate our options, Eric rearranges his messy sock drawer – blindfolded.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Trip to Mexico
programme.desc: Alim knows a few countries where it is common to have insects as part of your menu. Our heroes are a bit taken aback. They decide to go to Taxco in Mexico, where Felipe is waiting for them to hunt some bugs! Grilled, they are a local delicacy.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Suspicious Circles
programme.desc: When crop circles begin appearing in Ayrton Park, Alex suspects visitors from the fourth dimension, but Addison begins sleuthing in search of a different explanation.

programme.title: Mundi's Day Off
programme.desc: How could we have superpowers? The team flies off to Germany, to borrow some high-tech ‘super' suits. They try using a climbing suit, a jet pack and a powerlifting suit, but none is able to recover the Frisbee.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: The Biggest Animals
programme.desc: Mr. Battery collects photos of the largest animals, but he's still missing a photo of the mysterious giant squid.

programme.title: Trip to Saudi Arabia
programme.desc: Our heroes travel to Saudi Arabia and meet up with Ahed. He knows different ways to move in the desert by day and night, but what he does not know is where his goats have gone. He is going to need some help from his friends.

programme.title: Team Doki's Big Adventure
programme.desc: While practicing some circus-style tricks, team Doki gets an idea to put on a real circus show for all their friends of the Worldwide Expedition Club. Doki wants it to be amazing, so they set off to a real circus to find out how to put on the Greatest Show on Earth.

programme.title: Pilou and her Loose Tooth
programme.desc: Pilou notices she has a loose tooth and she's a bit scared: she doesn't want to touch it because she's afraid it could be painful! Isotta calms her down and suggests her to visit her kitten Mimi, the pediatrician cat.

programme.title: Ebb's Winter Coat
programme.desc: Granny has knitted an orange and purple striped coat for Ebb. Flo takes Ebb for a beach walk in the new coat. But it's too hot. Ebb takes a dip. Ebb's coat stretches and stretches. Ebb and Bird find they have a new orange and purple winter blanket.

programme.title: Team Doki's Big Adventure
programme.desc: While practicing some circus-style tricks, team Doki gets an idea to put on a real circus show for all their friends of the Worldwide Expedition Club. Doki wants it to be amazing, so they set off to a real circus to find out how to put on the Greatest Show on Earth.

programme.title: The Biggest Animals
programme.desc: Mr. Battery collects photos of the largest animals, but he's still missing a photo of the mysterious giant squid.

programme.title: Sensational Senses!
programme.desc: Eric is blindfolded and has to figure out what a mystery object is using his other four senses – hearing, taste, touch and smell. He learns that although most animals have the same senses people do, they use them differently.

programme.title: Banquet
programme.desc: Howler and Dove are invited to Lord Roach's banquet. But banquets come with all kinds of rules and regulations, exposing the greedier guests in the room! Hardened foodies, they indulge in all kinds of scheming.

programme.title: The Search for Life
programme.desc: The search for life in the universe remains one of the most ambitious quests of humankind. Host Emily Calandrelli explores the possibility that life exists in our own celestial backyard.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Ice hockey brothers Rais and Aren are off to Canada for the trip of a lifetime, as Aren has a tournament and is hoping to make his family proud. And Ella and Asiyah are showing us just what determined young skaters they are.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Trip to Saudi Arabia
programme.desc: Our heroes travel to Saudi Arabia and meet up with Ahed. He knows different ways to move in the desert by day and night, but what he does not know is where his goats have gone. He is going to need some help from his friends.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: Banquet
programme.desc: Howler and Dove are invited to Lord Roach's banquet. But banquets come with all kinds of rules and regulations, exposing the greedier guests in the room! Hardened foodies, they indulge in all kinds of scheming.

programme.title: Matching Socks
programme.desc: In this episode we explain the concept of 'probability'. How can we weigh all our possibilities to eventually pick the most likely outcome? In order to illustrate our options, Eric rearranges his messy sock drawer – blindfolded.

programme.title: New Names
programme.desc: Can the Junior Vets determine the sex of a very special penguin? Six cute kittens need checkups and new names - meet X-ray, Smudge, and, of course, baby Johnny! And Paul, the rat, has trouble breathing.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Engaging Engineering
programme.desc: How do simple building elements create architecture? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of construction. Have hands-on fun by building your own tower, and get to know Fazlur Rahman Khan, who came up with the ‘tube' structure in skyscraper design.

programme.title: E123 - The Crew Builds A Fountain Show / The Crew Builds A Carousel
programme.desc: When Sierra Sparkle's big concert stage needs some extra sparkle, Rubble & Crew use a construction complication to make a big splash. // Rubble & Crew decide to go big when Grocer Gabriel wants something special built outside of his grocery store.

programme.title: E221 - Vandal! / Tumbles, Where Did You Go?
programme.desc: Barbidur catches a mysterious masked vandal. // Tototutu, Barbidur's favorite little car, has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: E108 - Double Booked / Bogweed / Prizes
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once. // Tim tries to find a bogweed free snack for Kai. // After losing again and again, Tia tries to win every party game.

programme.title: E832 - Viking Day
programme.desc: Peppa and George join Granny Pig and her friends to play at being Vikings. The Vikings are having fun on Grandpa Pig's boat until they realise they've left their picnic behind!

programme.title: E412 - Snow Day Showdown
programme.desc: It's a snowy day in Axle City, and every truck in town is lining up for a delicious winter warm-up: hot chocolate! But when Crusher tries to take all the hot chocolate for himself, Blaze is in hot pursuit to get it back!

programme.title: E221 - Vandal! / Tumbles, Where Did You Go?
programme.desc: Barbidur catches a mysterious masked vandal. // Tototutu, Barbidur's favorite little car, has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: E114 - Pups Save The Bay / Pups Save A Goodway
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol clean up a small oil spill in the water to save the animals in Adventure Bay. // When Adventure Bay's famous statue ends up at the bottom of the Bay, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to find a clever way to bring it back!

programme.title: E201 - Happy Parky
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever.

programme.title: E517 - Bedtime Story
programme.desc: Daddy Pig reads Peppa and George a bedtime story. Later George wakes up again, so Peppa has to make up another story.

programme.title: E224 - The Puppet / Gloop Gloop Ah-Ah
programme.desc: The Barbababies decide to create a show and go all out! // Barbotine wants to create the best lemonade.

programme.title: E221 - Pups Save Walinda / Pups Save A Big Bone
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol plan a special celebration for Wally the Walrus. When he doesn't show up, they find he has a special new friend named Walinda! // During Cap'n Turbot's archaeological dig, a rock slide unearths a big dinosaur bone!

programme.title: E123 - Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: Born To Shine
programme.desc: The series revolves around music and chasing dreams.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: I Am What I Am
programme.desc: An asexual and aromantic woman struggles to survive in a world that pressures people to find love.

programme.title: The Flower Of My Secret
programme.desc: A frustrated wife and writer of successful, yet sentimental novels sets out to make a better life for herself.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.desc: Halfway through their food truck journey, the three hosts head to Kemaman, Terengganu, to join a river terrapin conservation activity and enjoy the local fish noodles.

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Pamilya Sagrado
programme.desc: A gripping family drama and political thriller set in the world of Freemasonry and fraternity hazing. The Sagrado family, a powerful political clan, faces moral dilemmas and scandals that threaten their reputation and unity. As secrets unravel, they must choose between protecting their name and staying true to their principles, all while navigating corruption, loyalty, and betrayal.

programme.title: Kapamilya Daily Mass[Live]
programme.desc: A daily celebration of the Liturgy of the Lord with Fr. Tito Caluag. Join us as we reflect on the goodness of God in this healing mass.

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: E21 - The Hare And The Monkey Make A Bet
programme.desc: The monkey and the hare both suffer from the unfounded prejudice people have about them. So they make a bet, to prove to everyone how wrong they are.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S7
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Le Chant Du Fleuve
programme.desc: Poetic and patrimonial walk along the Loire. This dreamlike escapade, depicted as a love story between the river and the literature it has inspired, highlights the changing beauty of the Loire shores to the rhythm of the seasons.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes:2025-2026
programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: La Volante
programme.desc: While he is taking his wife to hospital to give birth, Thomas hits and kills a young man on the road. The young man's mother Marie-France, is devastated. Nine years later, without revealing her identity, she becomes Thomas' secretary and gets more and more involved in his life.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Climate change is our defining crisis, and it is happening even faster than we thought. But we're not powerless to stop it. The impacts of climate change are felt in every corner of the world. Increased temperatures are causing environmental disasters. The sea levels are rising, the Arctic is melting, coral reefs are dying, oceans are acidifying, and forests are burning. It is clear that business as usual is not an option. With climate change reaching irreversible heights, now is the time for bold collective action. The climate emergency is a race we are losing, but it is a race we can win.

programme.title: E8 - Eco Innovators
programme.desc: Eco-innovators introduce Zac and Darin to unique and cost-effective ways to address complex problems and help heal the environment.

programme.title: E6 - Right Under Our Nose
programme.desc: Claudia and Robin scramble to find a second jade boulder before their buyer backs out of the deal, but they’re running out of time and options.

With climate change reaching irreversible heights, now is the time for bold collective action. The climate emergency is a race we are losing, but it is a race we can win.

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E2 - JJ Sings & Dances to Classic Rhymes!
programme.desc: It's a dance party featuring all your favorite classic rhymes! Join JJ, Bella & Cece as they dance to 'Hey Diddle Diddle' while the cow jumps over the moon. The fun continues as they help their friend Humpty Dumpty get home after a great fall with the help of some sea creature friends! Then, get ready to rock out with a band of monkeys in a brand-new version of 'Rockabye Baby.' From 'Five Little Speckled Frogs' to 'Looby Loo,' it's a dance party full of classic fun!

programme.title: E1 - JJ's Yummy Food & Clean-Up Fun!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy food & clean-up fun with JJ! First, learn about all types of pasta & make some from scratch in Grandma's kitchen. Then, Cody's Dad shows how fun & tasty healthy eating can be with delicious sliced fruit. After all the fun, it's time to clean up! JJ's family gives Bingo a scrub in the tub after he gets dirty playing outside, & all the kids chip in to wash a filthy firetruck. It's fun to make a mess, & even more fun to clean up!

Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: Jagadhatri E161
programme.desc: Jagaddhatri, a secret crime officer, and orphan Swayambhu partner to fight crime. Only a few friends know her real identity; later, they marry happily.

programme.title: Bhabi Ji Ghar Par Hai! E2830
programme.desc: In this hilarious comedy, two neighboring couples, the Mishras and the Tiwaris, navigate the chaos that ensues when each husband develops a crush on the other's wife!

programme.title: Vasudha E512
programme.desc: Vasudha, a cheerful maid, joins business leader Chandrika's home. Despite differing beliefs, she seeks Chandrika's approval and struggles to fit into her elite world.

programme.desc: Lakshmi, a strong-willed woman, bravely faces pressures in a traditional joint family and stays by her husband Shriniwas, who works hard to build his dream house.

programme.desc: Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

programme.title: E53
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E14 - 慢熱的人學會了共同向前
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E23 - 飛行員表白女導演
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E14 - 慢熱的人學會了共同向前
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E3 - 新成員加入倍受歡迎

programme.title: First Gentleman
programme.desc: Ornithologist (a scholar of birds) Hiyori Soma is married to Rinko, leader of a minority political party. One morning, his beloved wife poses an enigmatic question. “Hey, Hiyori, would you have a problem if I became Prime Minister?” He asks her to repeat the question, but she shrugs him off. Still confused, he sets off for a ten-day expedition on a remote island with no cell phone connection to observe birds in the wild. In his absence, Rinko changes the future of the nation! She is elected the first female Prime Minister in Japan's history, making Hiyori the first ever Prime Minister's husband. He was always 100% supportive of Rinko's political ambitions, but could never have imagined the life that awaited him...

programme.title: She Shoots Straight
programme.desc: One by one, the Huangs died in the course of safeguarding law and order in Hong Kong. First, the father and then the two elder sons gave their lives in action. That leaves Tsung-pao, the youngest son, and four daughters. They are all police officers. What makes the mother prouder is Tsung-pao's marrying a senior policewoman Mina. Old Mrs. Huang is hoping to see a grandson to carry on the lawmen family tree. But the sisters don't like Mina. They make sure she does not have a good time. Mina suffers in silence. A raid on a Vietnamese gang was ordered. Tsung-pao and Mina to command. But sister Ling commits a serious mistake and the whole operation fails. Ling is suspended. She blames it on Mina...
